name: AgentSite Atlas
description: A static atlas of generated AgentSite proof sites and recipe coverage.
brief: Create a static GitHub Pages site that demonstrates an AgentSite Atlas: a searchable directory of generated proof sites, live links, repos, recipe coverage, deploy evidence, layers, and next improvements. It must be public-safe and not claim live monitoring.
heroHeadline: A navigable atlas of generated AgentSites
heroLede: The page turns scattered proof sites into a public static system map with recipe coverage, deploy links, live URLs, and next improvements.
visualDirection: dark cockpit atlas directory with static proof-site cards and recipe filters

sections.title: Proof sites become a system map
sections.body: The atlas captures each generated proof site with repo, live URL, deploy evidence, recipes, layer, and next step.

sections.title: Recipe coverage is visible
sections.body: Future agents can see which archetypes and section recipes have been validated and where to apply them next.

sections.title: Atlas data stays public-safe
sections.body: The atlas is not live monitoring, private repo inventory, or an authoritative deploy dashboard.

proofArtifacts.label: Atlas data
proofArtifacts.body: src/data/atlas.json contains public-safe verified proof-site records validated by npm run check:atlas.

proofArtifacts.label: Atlas UI
proofArtifacts.body: src/components/AgentSiteAtlas.astro filters proof sites by text and recipe.

proofArtifacts.label: Atlas QA
proofArtifacts.body: Visual QA exercises atlas search and recipe filters when the atlas is present.

allowedClaims: Repo-local QA scripts validate atlas data
approvalRequired: Adding analytics, cookies, tracking pixels, or third-party forms
Adding payment links or enabling payment mode
Indexing private repos, credentials, secrets, or unpublished user data
Adding live GitHub API monitoring, server runtime, authentication, or a database
